channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Khanna backs Platner despite calling his past relationships 'toxic,' says he deserves a second chance
item.description: Rep. Ro Khanna described Graham Platner's past relationships as 'toxic and volatile' but noted the Senate candidate is taking responsibility.

item.title: Trump grants full pardon to former Rep. Stephen Buyer for 2023 insider trading conviction
item.description: President Donald Trump issued a full pardon to former Rep. Stephen Buyer, clearing his 2023 insider trading conviction that led to a 22-month prison sentence.

item.title: Democrat Xavier Becerra advances in California governor race
item.description: Democrat Xavier Becerra moved to the general election for California governor on Friday, positioning himself as an experienced candidate to lead the state.
